description.ko: AQUA-5는 바다의 가장 깊고 도달하기 어려운 곳에 숨겨진 비밀을 밝혀내기 위해 극한의 압력을 견딜 수 있도록 설계된 차세대 심해 탐사선입니다.
description.en: AQUA-5 is a next-generation deep-sea vessel engineered to withstand extreme pressures while uncovering the hidden secrets of the ocean's most unreachable depths.

prompt: A cinematic shot of the AQUA-5 submersible navigating the pitch-black deep ocean floor, illuminated by vibrant cyan bioluminescence and high-powered floodlights, revealing mysterious trenches and alien-like sea life, futuristic sleek design, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic, atmospheric depth.
